description: Tailwind utility → GPOS Lite design token class mappings. Add entries incrementally; only map when the replacement is defined in tailwind.config.js or preserves the same CSS variable output.
notes: Mappings are applied longest-match-first per class token.
Variant/responsive prefixes (hover:, md:, etc.) are preserved automatically.
Verify visual output after each batch with --dry-run then --apply.
